lines.en_lit: Rather, not conclude from it Rabbi Eliezer ben Ya’akov? conclude from it
Rav Adda, son of Rav Yitzḥak, said: This chamber was removed And who comes from the north, appears to him south and who comes from the south, appears to him north
it is reasonable was southwest From where From that we raise a contradiction shewbread shewbread
And we resolve Rav Huna, son of Rav Yehoshua, said: The Master envisions via right, the Master envisions via left,
